enabled.description: Master switch. When false, HistorySearch/HistoryRead return a disabled notice.

sessionsDir.description: Override pi's sessions base directory. When null, resolves from $PI_SESSIONS_DIR then ~/.pi/agent/sessions. A leading ~ is expanded.

indexOnStart.description: Run an incremental index of the current project on session_start.

includeToolResults.description: Index tool-result messages too. Larger index, higher recall.

maxResults.description: Default number of sessions returned by HistorySearch.

snippetsPerSession.description: Number of matching snippets returned per session.
